channel.title: Chambers of AK Legal Updates
channel.description: Legal updates, procedural guides, case notes and document checklists from Chambers of AK.

item.title: RERA Complaint Drafting: Documents, Reliefs and Legal Strategy
item.description: A document-first guide to structuring facts, legal grounds, annexures and relief-specific prayers in a RERA complaint.

item.title: PMLA Cognizance After BNSS: Pre-Hearing Rule
item.description: Legal explainer on pre-cognizance hearing of accused in PMLA complaints when cognizance is taken after BNSS came into force.

item.title: Section 34 Arbitration Limitation: 3 Months + 30 Days Rule
item.description: Practical guide to Section 34 arbitration limitation, calendar-month counting, court holidays, delay condonation and recent Supreme Court cases.

item.title: UAPA Bail, Section 43D(5) and Article 21
item.description: Updated legal analysis of UAPA bail, Section 43D(5), Article 21, Watali, K.A. Najeeb, Gulfisha Fatima and Syed Iftikhar Andrabi.

item.title: Sabarimala Case: 9-Judge Bench 2026 Explained
item.description: Detailed explainer on the Sabarimala case, the 2018 judgment, the review reference and the nine-judge Bench hearings reserved on 14 May 2026.

item.title: Arbitration notice before claim
item.description: Clause-first guide to Section 21 invocation, limitation, appointment procedure, interim relief and document preparation before arbitration begins.

item.title: Property title search before purchase in India
item.description: Document-first guide to title-chain, revenue, municipal, encumbrance and litigation checks before buying property in India.

item.title: Can non-reportable judgments be published online?
item.description: Gujarat High Court case brief on non-reportable judgments, online publication and public court records.

item.title: SARFAESI auction sale challenge: documents and Rule 9(4) timeline
item.description: Supreme Court case brief on auction-sale finality, balance consideration, redemption and DRT/DRAT records.

item.title: Summary judgment in commercial suits under Order XIII-A CPC
item.description: Supreme Court case brief on pleadings, documents, real prospect test and mini-trial caution.

item.title: MSME Facilitation Council process for delayed payments
item.description: Udyam records, invoices, 45-day issue, conciliation, arbitration, interest and enforcement preparation.

item.title: Cheque bounce case after summons: defence preparation
item.description: Complaint papers, summons, notice proof, liability review, settlement and court-stage preparation.

item.title: MSME delayed payment documents checklist
item.description: Udyam records, invoice-wise summaries, purchase orders, delivery proof, ledgers and communications.

item.title: Before filing a commercial recovery suit
item.description: Contract clauses, invoice ledgers, limitation, pre-filing issues and dispute records.

item.title: Delayed possession: refund or interest?
item.description: Relief selection, project documents, possession timelines and forum location in RERA disputes.

item.title: Arbitration clause checklist before a dispute
item.description: Seat, venue, appointment, notice, interim relief, enforcement and papers to preserve.

item.title: Cheque bounce: 30-day notice timeline
item.description: A practical date-chart approach for cheque dishonour notices, limitation and complaint preparation.

item.title: MSME delayed payment claims: first review
item.description: How to organize invoices, Udyam records, delivery proof and buyer communications for MSME delayed payment claims.

item.title: Bihar RERA complaint preparation
item.description: A document-first approach to delayed possession, refund, interest and builder dispute complaints.

item.title: Cheque bounce notice and limitation
item.description: Key dates to track before filing or defending a Section 138 cheque bounce complaint.

item.title: MSME 45-day payment rule
item.description: Document and date preparation for MSME delayed payment claims and buyer responses.

item.title: Section 138 cheque bounce limitation
item.description: Limitation, demand notice and complaint timelines in cheque dishonour matters.

item.title: RERA delayed possession in Bihar
item.description: Refund, interest and possession relief considerations in delayed possession matters.

item.title: Commercial suit documents checklist
item.description: Contracts, invoices, ledger records, notices, admissions, limitation and forum-preparation checklist for business recovery.

item.title: Property injunction suit documents
item.description: Possession, title, site photographs, notices and urgent-court preparation in property injunction suits.

item.title: Section 34 arbitration award challenge
item.description: Limitation, grounds, record preparation and court-stage considerations for award challenges.

item.title: Reply to RERA Complaint by Builder or Promoter: Documents, Defence and Strategy
item.description: A promoter-side guide to preparing a structured reply to RERA complaints, including documents, delay reasons, payment defaults, possession offer and settlement strategy.
